problem:
How do I execute a program or call a system command?.

How do I call an external command within Python as if I had typed it in a shell or command prompt?
expected_solution_keywords: How do I execute a program or call a system command?
memory_hint:
How do I execute a program or call a system command?.

Use subprocess.run:

import subprocess

subprocess.run(["ls", "-l"
failure_without_memory: How do I call an external command within Python as if I had typed it in a shell or command prompt?
